title: NIMHANS Notification 2026 - Walk-in interview for Junior Research Fellow Posts
description: The National Institute of Mental Health and Neuro Sciences (NIMHANS) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 01 Junior Research Fellow Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their Post-graduation and Ph.D. can apply for the NIMHANS Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can attend the walk-in interview.
